title: Tmag_Force Status
notes: Tmag_Force returns the resultant torque for the subject axes specified in Tmag_Axes in the force coordinate system specified by the CoordinateSystem.
see_also:
Applies To

Force Monitor

Tmag_Axes Property
examples:
Function Test_Tmag_Force Real rVar FSet FCS1.Position, 0, 0, 100 FSet FCS1.Orientation, FG_TOOL FSet FM1.ForceSensor, 1 FSet FM1.CoordinateSystem, FCS1 FSet FM1.Tmag_Axes, FG_XY FGet FM1.Tmag_Force, rVar Print rVar
Fend
